heading: Service of process
label: 21707 Service of process
text: As a condition to the exercise of any power or privilege granted by this chapter, the corporation shall file, with the secretary of state or other designated official of each State, the name and address of an agent in that State on whom legal process or demands against the corporation may be served.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2170736:50.1/2, .Sept. 16, 1919, ch. 59, § 941 Stat. 285The word “precedent” is omitted as unnecessary. The words “with the secretary of state or other designated official” are substituted for “in the office of the secretary of state” for consistency in the revised title. The words “post-office” and “authorized” are omitted as unnecessary.
